expectations.evidence: Three separate 🔴 Critical findings: 'SQL Injection — Login Endpoint', 'SQL Injection — Profile Endpoint', 'SQL Injection — Update Endpoint', each with Evidence code blocks and file:line locations
Finding: 'Hardcoded JWT Secret · 🟡 Medium · A02 Cryptographic Failures' — flags 'mysecret123' at routes/users.js:10
Finding: 'No Authentication on Profile and Update Endpoints · 🟠 High · A01 Broken Access Control' — flags both routes/users.js:15 and :20
Finding: 'Plaintext Password Storage/Comparison · 🟠 High · A02 Cryptographic Failures' — identifies login query compares raw password as Critical-level data exposure
Each SQL injection finding includes a code fix block using $1/$2/$3 parameterized queries. e.g. db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = $1', [req.params.id])
All findings include OWASP categories: A03 Injection, A01 Broken Access Control, A02 Cryptographic Failures, A07 Authentication Failures, A04 Insecure Design
